docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,346.22 FILED BY GKO & ASSOCIATES,INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CAMBRIDGE DESIGN GROUP,INC. WEINGARTEN,JOEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
